title: Add Payment via Email messaging to Checkout and Thank You pages

requirements.text: On the CheckoutPage, add a 'Secure Payment Process' notice box positioned between the Order Total display and the Place Order button. The box must have a background color of #F8F5F0 (very light beige), rounded corners, a small lock icon on the left, and comfortable vertical margin above and below. The title text should read 'Secure Payment Process' and the body should read: 'After placing your order, we will send a secure payment link to your email. Payment will be completed securely through that link to confirm your order.' All typography and styling must match the existing knotankey soft luxury aesthetic.

quotes: Below the Order Total and above the Place Order button, add a notice box
After placing your order, we will send a secure payment link to your email.
Small lock icon on the left

acceptanceCriteria: Notice box appears between the Order Total and Place Order button on the checkout page
A small lock icon is visible on the left side of the notice
Body text reads 'After placing your order, we will send a secure payment link to your email. Payment will be completed securely through that link to confirm your order.'
Adequate vertical margin ensures the box does not appear cramped
Styling is consistent with the knotankey soft luxury aesthetic

requirements.text: On the ThankYouPage (order confirmation page), add a payment instructions message block displayed below the existing order confirmation message. The message should read: 'Your order has been received. We will review your order and send a secure payment link to your email shortly to complete the purchase. Please complete the payment through that link to confirm your order.' Style this message to match the soft luxury knotankey aesthetic, consistent with the notice box added on the checkout page.

quotes: On the order confirmation / thank you page, display this message under the confirmation message.
Your order has been received. We will review your order and send a secure payment link to your email shortly to complete the purchase.
Please complete the payment through that link to confirm your order.

acceptanceCriteria: Payment instructions block appears below the main confirmation message on the ThankYouPage
Text includes 'Your order has been received. We will review your order and send a secure payment link to your email shortly to complete the purchase.'
Text includes 'Please complete the payment through that link to confirm your order.'
Styling is consistent with the knotankey soft luxury aesthetic and the checkout page notice box

constraints: Do not modify any backend files — this is a frontend-only change
Do not alter the existing order submission or routing logic in CheckoutPage
Immutable paths (frontend/src/hooks/, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui) must not be modified
nonGoals: Implementing actual email sending or payment link generation
Integrating any payment gateway or Stripe
Modifying order data models or backend endpoints
Changing any other pages beyond CheckoutPage and ThankYouPage
